page: Microsoft Azure D4nds_v6 is a network-optimized virtual machine belonging to the Dndv6 server family. Powered by an Intel processor with an x86_64 architecture, this instance features 4 dedicated vCPUs and 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The server runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, ensuring secure and isolated virtualization for enterprise workloads.

For storage needs, the D4nds_v6 includes 236 GB of local disk space and is fully capable of utilizing Premium Storage options. This local storage capacity provides fast read and write access for temporary files and caching. The instance does not include any bundled GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses, focusing its resource allocation entirely on compute, memory, and network throughput.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the D4nds_v6 offers a balanced hardware profile suitable for workloads requiring dedicated CPU resources and moderate memory density without the overhead of specialized accelerators. This configuration is well-suited for general-purpose applications, network-optimized tasks, database hosting, and web serving environments that benefit from local disk storage and Premium Storage compatibility.
description: Microsoft Azure D4nds_v6 is an x86_64 general-purpose virtual machine within the Dndv6 server family, optimized for network performance and local storage capabilities. Running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, it features 4 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 16.0 GB of RAM, maintaining a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. The instance is equipped with 236 GB of local disk storage and supports Premium Storage configurations, though it lacks integrated GPUs and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This hardware profile provides a reliable balance of compute and memory resources, making it qualitatively cost-effective for workloads that do not require specialized hardware accelerators. The D4nds_v6 is suited for general-purpose applications, web serving, database hosting, and network-optimized tasks requiring fast local temporary storage.
